summary: WAZA Legal Pages & Demo Modal - Complete testing of French legal pages (/privacy, /terms, /contact, /about), updated navbar/footer navigation, and interactive WhatsApp demo modal with Claude AI integration. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Empty message returns 500 instead of 422 validation error

action_items: Consider adding Pydantic validation for empty message in /api/demo/chat endpoint (minor)
test_credentials: No auth needed - all tested pages/endpoints are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal pages and demo modal fully functional. All French content displays correctly. Demo chat uses Claude AI via Emergent LLM key. Contact form submission is MOCKED (frontend-only toast after 1.2s delay, no backend endpoint).

landing_page.navbar_links: ✓ 'À propos' and 'Contact' links visible and working
landing_page.footer_links: ✓ All 4 links (À propos, Confidentialité, Conditions, Contact) working

demo_modal.whatsapp_ui: ✓ Dark theme (#0B141A, #1F2C34) with green user bubbles (#005C4B)
demo_modal.chat_input: ✓ Input field and send button functional

privacy_page.french_content: ✓ 'Politique de Confidentialité' title and all sections in French

terms_page.french_content: ✓ 'Conditions d'Utilisation' title and all sections in French

contact_page.form_fields: ✓ Name, Email, Subject (select), Message fields present
contact_page.form_submission: ✓ MOCKED - shows success toast after 1.2s delay

about_page.french_content: ✓ 'À propos de WAZA' title, mission, values in French

mocked_integrations.contact_form_submission: Frontend-only mock - shows success toast after 1.2s, no backend endpoint

backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/demo/chat: 200 OK - Returns AI response with session_id
